subject: Starly, a small round starling-like bird Pokémon, perched on a branch among berry-laden shrubs
description: A small, round bird Pokémon with dark and light patterned plumage perches on a branch or twig surrounded by berry-bearing plant clusters. The creature has a short beak, large round eyes, and compact wings tucked close to its body. The background shows foliage and small red berries, suggesting an outdoor woodland or hedgerow environment. The art style is soft and charming.
foreground: small round bird Pokémon perched on branch with berries nearby
